# Project AI Skills

This project has AI agent skills installed in `.agents/skills/`.
Read the corresponding SKILL.md for detailed guidelines when working on related tasks.

## Usage

Each skill directory contains:
- `SKILL.md` — Main instructions and trigger conditions
- `AGENTS.md` — Navigation guide (Codex compatible)
- `references/` — Detailed documentation files (read on-demand)
